classification.task_goal: Fix the image merging code to avoid broadcasting errors.
primary_constraints: The dimensions of the panorama array must accommodate all merged images.
The images passed to the merge_images function must be of compatible sizes.
classification.reasoning: The user attempted to adjust the code to ensure that the dimensions of the panorama and the images being merged were compatible. They provided a solution to modify the height of the panorama and the way curr_x was incremented, indicating an effort to repair the constraints despite encountering errors.
